sentences.arabic: تَذَكَّرَ يَاسِرٌ أَنَّهُ وَعَدَ صَدِيقَهُ وَلَمْ يَفِ.
sentences.translation: Jasir je sjeo da je obećao prijatelju ali nije ispunio.
sentences.translationEn: Yasir remembered that he had promised his friend but did not fulfill it.

sentences.translation: Otišao mu je i ispričao mu se.
sentences.translationEn: He went to him and apologized to him.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ لَهُ: الْوَفَاءُ بِالْوَعْدِ وَاجِبٌ عَلَى الْمُؤْمِنِ.
sentences.translation: Rekao mu je: Ispunjavanje obećanja je obaveza vjernika.
sentences.translationEn: He told him: Fulfilling promises is obligatory for a believer.

sentences.arabic: وَفَى بِوَعْدِهِ بَعْدَ ذَلِكَ وَلَمْ يَنْسَ مَرَّةً أُخْرَى.
sentences.translation: Ispunio je obećanje nakon toga i više nije zaboravio.
sentences.translationEn: He fulfilled his promise after that and never forgot again.
